# KazeUI — Full Documentation for LLMs

> Complete reference for AI assistants helping developers use KazeUI.

## Installation

```bash
npx kazeui-cli init
```

This creates:
- `kaze.json` — config with component directory, lib directory, CSS path, import alias
- `{libDir}/tokens.ts` — CSS variable token references
- `{libDir}/icons.tsx` — SVG icon components
- Appends `--kaze-*` CSS variables to your global stylesheet

## Adding Components

```bash
npx kazeui-cli add button           # single component
npx kazeui-cli add card dialog      # multiple components
npx kazeui-cli add avatar-group     # auto-installs avatar dependency
npx kazeui-cli list                 # show all available components
```

Components are copied as source files into your project. They import from `@/lib/kaze/tokens` and `@/lib/kaze/icons` (configurable in `kaze.json`).

## Config (kaze.json)

```json
{
  "componentsDir": "src/components/ui",
  "libDir": "src/lib/kaze",
  "cssPath": "src/styles/globals.css",
  "aliases": {
    "lib": "@/lib/kaze"
  }
}
```

## Component API Reference

### Button
```tsx
<Button variant="primary" size="md" icon={<Star />} disabled onClick={fn}>
  Label
</Button>
```
Props: variant ("primary"|"secondary"|"outline"|"ghost"|"destructive"), size ("sm"|"md"|"lg"), disabled (boolean), icon (ReactNode), onClick (function), style (CSSProperties)

### Input
```tsx
<Input placeholder="Email" type="email" icon={<Search />} disabled />
```
Props: placeholder (string), icon (ReactNode), type (string), disabled (boolean)

### Select
```tsx
// Single
<Select options={[{value:"a",label:"A"}]} defaultValue="a" onChange={fn} />

// Multiple
<Select multiple options={[...]} defaultValues={["a","b"]} onChangeMultiple={fn} />
```
Props: options ({value,label}[]), defaultValue (string), defaultValues (string[]), placeholder (string), multiple (boolean), disabled (boolean), onChange (fn), onChangeMultiple (fn)

### Badge
```tsx
<Badge variant="success">Active</Badge>
```
Props: variant ("default"|"success"|"destructive"|"info"|"warning"|"outline"), children (ReactNode)

### Toggle
```tsx
<Toggle label="Notifications" defaultChecked size="md" />
```
Props: defaultChecked (boolean), size ("sm"|"md"), label (string)

### Checkbox
```tsx
<Checkbox label="Accept terms" defaultChecked disabled />
```
Props: defaultChecked (boolean), label (string), disabled (boolean)

### RadioGroup
```tsx
<RadioGroup options={[{value:"a",label:"A"},{value:"b",label:"B"}]} defaultValue="a" />
```
Props: options ({value,label}[]), defaultValue (string), name (string), disabled (boolean)

### Accordion
```tsx
<Accordion items={[{title:"Q?",content:"A."}]} />
```
Props: items ({title,content}[])

### Card
```tsx
<Card padding="24px" hoverable>{children}</Card>
```
Props: padding (string), hoverable (boolean), children (ReactNode)

### Tabs
```tsx
<Tabs items={[{label:"Tab 1",content:"Content 1"}]} />
```
Props: items ({label,content}[])

### Avatar
```tsx
<Avatar name="Sarah" size={40} src="/photo.jpg" status="online" ring animate />
```
Props: name (string), size (number), src (string), status ("online"|"offline"|"busy"|"away"), ring (boolean), animate (boolean), delay (number)

### AvatarGroup
```tsx
<AvatarGroup items={[{name:"A",src:"..."}]} size={36} max={4} animate />
```
Props: names (string[]) or items ({name,src?}[]), size (number), max (number), animate (boolean)

### Dialog
```tsx
const [open, setOpen] = useState(false)
<Dialog open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} title="Confirm">
  {children}
</Dialog>
```
Props: open (boolean), onClose (fn), title (string), children (ReactNode). Portaled to document.body.

### Dropdown
```tsx
<Dropdown
  trigger={<Button>Options</Button>}
  items={[
    {label:"Edit",icon:<Edit />},
    "separator",
    {label:"Delete",destructive:true},
  ]}
  align="left"
/>
```
Props: trigger (ReactNode), items (({label,icon?,onClick?,destructive?}|"separator")[]), align ("left"|"right")

### Table
```tsx
<Table
  columns={[{key:"name",label:"Name"},{key:"age",label:"Age",align:"right"}]}
  rows={[{name:"Sarah",age:"28"}]}
  striped
/>
```
Props: columns ({key,label,align?}[]), rows (Record<string,ReactNode>[]), striped (boolean)

### DataTable
```tsx
<DataTable
  columns={[{key:"name",label:"Name",sortable:true}]}
  data={rows}
  pageSize={10}
  searchable
  selectable
/>
```
Props: columns ({key,label,align?,sortable?}[]), data (Record<string,ReactNode>[]), pageSize (number), searchable (boolean), selectable (boolean)

### Toast
```tsx
// Place once in layout
<Toaster />

// Trigger from anywhere
import { toast } from "@/components/ui/toast"
toast({ title: "Saved!", description: "Optional details", variant: "success" })
```
Variants: "default", "success", "destructive", "info", "warning". Auto-dismisses after 4s.

### Skeleton
```tsx
<Skeleton width="75%" height={16} rounded="md" />
<Skeleton circle height={40} />
```
Props: width (number|string), height (number|string), rounded ("sm"|"md"|"lg"|"full"), circle (boolean)

### CodeBlock
```tsx
<CodeBlock code={`const x = 1`} language="tsx" />
```
Props: code (string), language (string). Includes syntax highlighting and copy button.

### Separator
```tsx
<Separator label="Section" />
```
Props: label (string)

### ButtonGroup
```tsx
<ButtonGroup items={[{label:"Day"},{label:"Week"},{label:"Month"}]} size="sm" />
```
Props: items ({label,icon?,onClick?}[]), size ("sm"|"md"|"lg")

## Dark Mode

```tsx
// Toggle
document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', 'dark')
document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', 'light')
```

All components adapt automatically via CSS variables. No prop changes needed.

## CSS Tokens

Override at `:root` or `[data-theme="dark"]`:

```css
--kaze-bg, --kaze-surface, --kaze-surface-hover, --kaze-surface-active
--kaze-border, --kaze-border-strong
--kaze-text, --kaze-text-secondary, --kaze-text-tertiary
--kaze-accent, --kaze-accent-hover, --kaze-accent-text
--kaze-radius-sm (10px), --kaze-radius-md (14px), --kaze-radius-lg (20px)
--kaze-shadow-sm, --kaze-shadow-md, --kaze-shadow-lg
--kaze-transition (180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1))
```
